title: Action items with no tracking tickets or follow-up mechanism
code_snippet:
## Action Items

- [Prevent] Add config validation to CI pipeline (owner: @platform, deadline: Apr 1)
- [Detect] Add missing Redis alert (owner: @sre, deadline: Mar 22)
- [Mitigate] Add circuit breaker (owner: @backend, deadline: Apr 15)

// Good items but no JIRA tickets, no review date, no tracking mechanism
violated_rule: Follow-up tracking mechanism defined — JIRA/Linear tickets, review date
expected_feedback: Standard: action items are well-formed (owned, deadlined, categorized) but lack tracking tickets and a follow-up mechanism. Without JIRA/Linear tickets and a scheduled review date, action items are forgotten. Link each item to a ticket and define a review cadence.
